forwarding_enabled.description: TCP forwarding policy. `local`/`both` are required for this router to be a jump host.

strong_crypto.description: Prefer strong ciphers/MACs/DH and disable weak ones (hardening).

always_allow_password_login.description: Allow password login even when the user has an SSH public key configured.

allow_none_crypto.description: Allow unencrypted connections (insecure — keep off unless you must).

host_key_type.description: Host key algorithm. Changing it regenerates the host key (clients must re-trust).

host_key_size.description: RSA host-key size in bits (e.g. 2048, 4096). Applies to rsa host keys.
